items.raw_excerpt: The insect is older than any amber-encased specimen, and may inspire scientists to look for more insects in fossilized dung
items.summary_en: Scientists found a new beetle species inside 230-million-year-old fossil feces. The insect is older than any beetle found in amber. The find may lead researchers to search for more insects in fossilized dung.

items.raw_excerpt: The temperature fell to as low as -10.2В° in the Utrecht village of Cabauw overnight, marking the first officially heavy frost of the winter. The temperature also fell to -10В° in Gilze en Rijen in Noord-Brabant and Herwijnen in Gelderland, weather bureau Weeronline said on Tuesday. Coastal provinces will be hit by snow showers on Tuesday, but there may also be rain and sleet, Weeronline said. The east of the country will remain dry with plenty of sunshine and temperatures...
items.summary_en: The temperature fell to -10.2В°C overnight in Cabauw, a village in Utrecht. It was the first official heavy frost of the winter. Snow showers, rain, and sleet were expected in coastal provinces.
